description: Layered prompt template for the premium-cinematic-landscape gold standard. Data only — slots are filled by PromptBuilder, never evaluated as code.

policy.negatives: no licensed logos, no real-person likenesses beyond the provided hero, no synthetic on-image text, no anatomical distortion, no low-contrast text, nothing critical in the bleed

notes: Headline/name/footer text is composited deterministically by the compositor backend, never generated by an image model.
seed is derived from jobId + this template version for reproducibility (see docs/PROMPT_STRATEGY.md).
